name: Real Estate Photo Scraper
tagline: Download every photo from any home listing in one click.
problem: Agents, buyers, and investors waste time saving listing photos one by one — right-clicking, downloading, renaming. When you're comparing multiple properties, it adds up fast.
solution: I built a tool that downloads every photo from a listing page in one click. Paste a URL from Redfin, Zillow, or Compass, and it saves all the photos to a folder on your computer — named and organized automatically.
result: What used to take 20–30 minutes of manual clicking per property now takes about 10 seconds.
description: No more saving images one by one. Paste a listing URL from Redfin, Zillow, or Compass and this tool downloads every photo instantly into a folder on your computer.
whoFor: Home buyers, investors, and agents who spend too much time manually saving listing photos when comparing properties or building reports.
useCommandHint: Have the listing open in Chrome, or paste the URL directly into Claude, then say:
useCommand: Download all the photos from this listing
requirements: Claude desktop app with Cowork mode enabled, plus the Claude in Chrome extension installed and active in your Chrome browser.
